typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "transfer to the zero address is not allowed"

arguments.value: transfer to the zero address is not allowed

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "transfer to the zero address is not allowed"

documentation.text:
@dev Overrides the internal _update function to block transfers to the zero address,
 effectively preventing anyone from "burning" (destroying) the tokens.
